item.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga PS4
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga PS4 at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • its the biggest LEGO Star Wars adventure to date!
  • features hundreds of playable characters from throughout the galaxy. Choose from a legion of heroes like Luke Skywalker, qui-gonn jinn, Chewbacca, leia organa, and Poe Dameron or turn to the dark side as Darth Vader, Kylo Ren, Darth Maul, emperor palpatine, and more.
  • whether on land or in space, hundreds of vehicles from across the galaxy are yours to Command. Jump to light speed in the Millennium Falcon, fly the t-47 airspeeder as you take down AT-AT walkers on Hoth, and battle first Order tie fighters in resistance X-Wings.
  • experience fun-filled adventures, whimsical humour, and the freedom to fully Immerse yourself in the LEGO Star Wars universe like never before.
  • Play through all nine Star Wars saga films in a brand-new LEGO videogame unlike any other.
  • players have the freedom to seamlessly travel to any planet, in any order, at any time.

🛒 Check the deal!!

Check the price of this item in other countries:

🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |

item.title: LEGO Minifigure Photography Klutz
item.description:
You’ve got LEGO Minifigure Photography Klutz at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • Learn tricks of perspective, scale, angles and lighting to make the minifigures world come to life
  • Become a famous photographer with LEGO minifigures as your star models
  • Includes two LEGO minifigures, LEGO props, printed backgrounds and punch-outs, plus a full-color 64-page book with stunning photo inspiration and how-to

item.title: Warner Bros - LEGO Worlds Nintendo Switch
item.description:
There’s a deal Warner Bros - LEGO Worlds Nintendo Switch here:

ℹ️:

  • Race, soar, zoom, and ride on a variety of vehicles and creatures from diggers and helicopters to horses and dragons Create and Customise your own LEGO World.
  • International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
  • Make your worlds come to life with customisable characters, both friendly and fearsome.
  • Uncover hidden treasures in environments that range from the fun to the fantastical.
